entities.name: Idea Compounder
entities.context: Divergent exploration mode that continues until user decides to stop; generates counterexamples and tests robustness

entities.name: Strategic Partner
entities.context: Decision support tool with multiple modes including aggressive (convergent) and idea-compound (divergent)

entities.name: N5 OS
entities.context: Operating system that integrates with Strategic Partner

entities.name: Round Control
entities.context: Explicit control mechanism showing contradictions found, angles opened, and next options after each exploration round

entities.name: Counterexample Generation
entities.context: Technique for testing robustness through edge cases, failure scenarios, and real-world contradictions

relationships.context: Idea Compounder is a mode of Strategic Partner (--mode idea-compound)
Strategic Partner integrates with N5 OS
System proactively generates counterexamples to test idea robustness
Uses explicit round control to let user decide direction after each exploration round
